G RO U P 250 Massachusetts Ave NW, Suite 400 | Washington, DC 20001
August 13, 2025
Secretary of the Senate
Office of Public Records
232 Hart Senate Office Building
Washington, DC 20510
Re: Senator Richard Blumenthal
Dear Madame Secretary:
We are writing on behalf of Senator Richard Blumenthal. Enclosed please find Senator
Blumenthal’s Periodic Disclosure of Financial Transactions (“PTR”) for transactions made in
2024. These additional transactions were identified during the process of preparing and
reviewing Senator Blumenthal’s public financial disclosure report for calendar year 2024.
Please do not hesitate to call us should you have further questions. Thank you for your
attention to this matter.
Very truly yours,
‘ = Cae ; fen ( a
Kate Sawyer Keane
Counsel to Senator Richard Blumenthal
